name: Flow A - Client Discovery (Sunbiz Query)
description: Daily trigger 6 AM ET. Query Sunbiz API for new FL companies <90 days. Branch: NAICS=561720 → skip (Flow B), else → continue. SAM check, enrich, Claude score, dedup, save to Airtable pending_review

qs.filterByFormula:
OR(
  SEARCH(LOWER('{{ $node['Enrich - Add SAM Data'].json.legal_name }}'), LOWER({legal_name})),
  SEARCH(LOWER('{{ $node['Enrich - Add SAM Data'].json.sunbiz_record_id }}'), {sunbiz_record_id})
)

nodes.name: Check - Already Exists or Opted Out
Filter - Skip Duplicates and Opted Out

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: {{ JSON.stringify($node['Filter - Skip Duplicates and Opted Out'].json) }}

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: {{ JSON.stringify($node['Enrich Prospect - Contact Details'].json || $node['Filter - Skip Duplicates and Opted Out'].json) }}

parameters.functionCode:
// Combine enriched data with scoring results and prepare for Airtable
const enriched = $node['Enrich Prospect - Contact Details'].json || {};
const scored = $node['Score via Claude API'].json || {};

return [{
  json: {
    ...($node['Filter - Skip Duplicates and Opted Out'].json),
    business_email: enriched.business_email || enriched.email || '',
    phone: enriched.phone || '',
    website: enriched.website || '',
    linkedin: enriched.linkedin || '',
    has_physical_office: enriched.has_physical_office || false,
    sqft_estimate: enriched.sqft_estimate || 0,
    employees_estimate: enriched.employees_estimate || 0,
    score: scored?.score || 0,
    service_fit: scored?.service_fit || 'unknown',
    segment: scored?.segment || 'Newly Formed',
    priority: scored?.priority || 5,
    intent_signal: scored?.intent_signal || 'low',
    icebreaker: scored?.icebreaker || '',
    pipeline_status: 'pending_review',
    source: 'Sunbiz',
    scored_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    is_virtual_office: !enriched.has_physical_office,
    change_detected: false,
    re_engagement_candidate: false,
    opt_out: false
  }
}];
